public.regime_lens: 🚦 RED — DOWNGRADED from the operator-signed YELLOW (6/19) by a mechanically-forced silver structural-floor breach: XAGUSD closed $57.34 (cache 6/25) / ~$59 (web 6/26) from $68.25 a week ago, slicing through both the F2 abort-all floor (67.87) and the weekly EXIT-ALL gate (63), with G:S blown out to ~69 toward the 72 hard line; the rates pillar turned structurally hawkish (May core PCE 3.4% highest since Oct 2023, headline 4.1%, market now pricing an ~80% December HIKE) so the mechanically-eased 10Y (cache 4.372, a fewer-hikes move not a dovish one) does NOT rescue the silver leg or re-arm GREEN; DXY at a one-year high (cache 101.349, cushion only ~0.65 to the 102 reduce gate) and a CONFIRMED RBI-reserves WATCH breach (672.59B, week ending 6/19) compound the deterioration; the lone offset is collapsing oil (Brent cache 73.37, WTI below 70, Hormuz reopening) which keeps this a controlled de-risk rather than a crisis; new deployment is OFF across the board and every silver bounce is now a potential EXIT, not an ADD · base: Geopolitical Stagflation over Policy Transition, now a hardening Warsh-era HAWKISH regime in which the market has repriced from one-dot-hike to an ~80% December rate HIKE while May core PCE confirmed sticky inflation (3.4% YoY) even as oil collapses on the US-Iran deal; the rates side is doing the tightening and the silver leg has broken its floor, so the two layers no longer offset and the dominant impulse is tighter → TIGHTENING · shock: Iran/Hormuz RESOLVED-to-disinflationary — the US-Iran deal is holding, the Strait of Hormuz is reopening (vessel traffic doubled to a February high, 500-plus ships still queued and mine-clearing weeks out), WTI fell to just below 70 and Brent to ~73, well under every oil gate; the geopolitical shock is now a tailwind and the genuine stress wire has moved ENDOGENOUS (silver floor breach plus the hawkish-hike repricing plus the DXY breakout), with a deal-collapse re-spike the only residual geopolitical tail · action: RED = no new deployment anywhere; existing positions = manage/de-risk, every bounce is a potentia... (refreshed 2026-06-28)
